title: CORA Field Inventory
description: Normalized per-module field inventory extracted from a standard's native artifact. The wire serialization of cora_extractors.inventory.Inventory.

version.description: Version label of the source artifact this inventory was extracted from.

source_artifact.description: Repo-relative path or URL of the native artifact this was extracted from.

extractor.description: Identifier of the extractor that produced this inventory, in the form 'module.name@version' (e.g. 'cora_extractors.xsd@0.0.0').

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this inventory was produced.

namespace_hint.description: Optional URI hint for the OWL/RDF projection's namespace. Has no effect at the inventory layer.

source_label.description: Short stable identifier for this inventory's primary source (e.g. 'xsd', 'excel', 'pdf'). Set by the extractor at construction time. Carried on the inventory so the same data wears the same label everywhere it appears. Required when calling Inventory.enrich.

types.description: Complex types declared by this module. Required for standards with class hierarchies (XSD, SQL). May be empty or omitted for flat-table standards (Excel data dictionaries).

fields.description: Field entries — every addressable leaf in this module.

unmatched_enrichments.description: Records of `other.fields` rows that found no match during enrich. Surfaces typos and sheet-mapping errors without polluting fields[].

source.description: Source label of the inventory that attested this value.

value.description: The attested value. Type matches the attribute being recorded (string, list[string], etc.).

location.description: Source-side source_location reference for this claim.

attribute.description: Name of the field/type attribute this provenance describes (e.g. 'definition', 'range').

claims.description: Every source that attested a value for this attribute on this field. Always ≥2; single-source attestations are not recorded here (the top-level value carries them).

chosen.description: Source label whose value lives at the top level. Present only when claims disagree; absent when all claims agree.

source.description: Source label of the inventory the unmatched row came from.

domain.description: Domain of the unmatched row, if any.

field.description: Leaf field name from the unmatched row.

name.description: Type identifier, unique within the module.

extends.description: Name of a parent type within this inventory's types[]. Becomes rdfs:subClassOf in the OWL projection.

abstract.description: True if this type cannot be instantiated directly.

definition.description: Human-readable description of the type. Sourced from xs:annotation/xs:documentation or equivalent.

source_location.description: Reference back to the native artifact (e.g. file:line).

provenance.description: Multi-source attestation records for this type's attributes. Present only when ≥2 sources attested.

path.description: Canonical field reference constructed by cora_extractors.path.build. Crosswalks reference this value.

domain.description: Name of the containing type from types[]. Required when types[] is non-empty; optional in flat-table inventories.

range.description: Either a primitive type name (e.g. 'xs:string') for datatype properties or a type name from types[] for object properties.

is_reference.description: True if this field is an object reference (owl:ObjectProperty); false if a datatype value (owl:DatatypeProperty).

cardinality.description: Occurrence semantics of this field on instances of its domain.

source_location.description: Reference back to the native artifact (e.g. file:line or sheet!cell).

enumeration.description: Allowed values, if the source declares them.

provenance.description: Multi-source attestation records for this field's attributes. Present only when ≥2 sources attested for at least one attribute. Untrusted claims (from sources not in the enrich trust list) are still recorded here, giving reviewers a full lineage.
